title: Remove board server DEBUG prints, use RunOutput for server lifecycle
description:
Clean up the board server's debug output.

1. Remove or gate all [DEBUG] fmt.Fprintf lines in internal/tickboard/server/ behind a debug flag or log level.
2. The board server should be silent on stderr by default. Debug output only when --dev flag is set.
3. Server lifecycle events (SSE client connect/disconnect, file watcher events) should go through RunOutput.Warn() or be suppressed entirely in production.

This is the final cleanup — after this, tk run output is fully controlled by RunOutput.

Files: internal/tickboard/server/server.go (and any other server files with debug prints)
closed_reason: Added debugf() helper method on Server that gates output behind devMode flag. Replaced all 25 [DEBUG] fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, ...) calls with s.debugf(...) calls. Non-debug stderr output (warnings, errors) left unchanged. Server is now silent on stderr by default; debug output only appears when --dev flag is set.
